## Verification

- [ ] `swift test`
- [ ] `swift build`
- [ ] `VERSION=<tag> ./scripts/package-release.sh`

## Productization Checks

- [ ] User-facing behavior is documented.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` or release notes are updated when release-visible.
- [ ] `docs/PRODUCT_REVIEW.md` has a MAGI note when this changes product maturity.
- [ ] Diagnostics remain token-redacted.
- [ ] No tokens, passwords, private logs, local config files, or release archives are committed.
